cha_list.desc:
CapCut is a new, easy-to-use video editing tool designed for mobile platforms. CapCut provides users with a wide range of video editing functions, filters, audio & visual effects, video templates, while keeping it free of charge and ads-free. Everyone can be a creator by using CapCut.  

Start creating your cool videos today: 
https://capcut.onelink.me/XKqI/228cad85
